prompts.text: This game covers three shape names: circle, square, triangle. Know the properties: circle (round, no corners), square (4 equal sides, 4 corners), triangle (3 sides, 3 corners). Use them each time.
When a shape appears, name it then describe it before pressing the TTS button: 'That's a square — four equal sides and four corners.' Model the word before the app speaks it.
Core question: 'What shape is it called? How many sides does it have?' — links the name to a property. Knowing the name alone isn't enough; knowing why it has that name builds understanding.
Environmental print: 'Can you find a [shape] in this room? Can you spot the written word anywhere near us?' — connects screen vocabulary to the real world.
